TL;DR: 本文发现大型推理模型（LRMs）的越狱攻击成功率与其注意力模式相关：成功攻击时，模型对输入提示中的有害词分配低注意力，但对推理内容中的有害词分配高注意力。基于此，提出一种利用强化学习（RL）增强攻击效果的方法，将注意力信号纳入奖励函数，并引入多样化说服策略丰富RL动作空间。实验证明该方法在有效性、效率和可迁移性上均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型推理模型在展示逐步推理过程时引入了额外的安全风险，现有研究表明LRMs比标准LLMs更容易受到越狱攻击，因此需要研究针对LRMs的特定攻击方法并揭示其内在机制。

Method: 1) 分析越狱攻击成功率与LRMs注意力模式之间的关联；2) 提出基于强化学习的越狱方法，将注意力信号作为奖励函数的一部分；3) 引入多样化说服策略以丰富RL动作空间，提升攻击效果。

Result: 在五个开源和闭源LRMs、三个基准测试上的大量实验表明，该方法在攻击成功率、效率和可迁移性方面均显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: LRMs的注意力模式与越狱攻击成功率密切相关，利用这一发现结合强化学习可以有效提升越狱攻击效果，为LRM安全研究提供新视角。

Abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in solving complex problems by generating structured, step-by-step reasoning content. However, exposing a model's internal reasoning process introduces additional safety risks; for example, recent studies show that LRMs are more vulnerable to jailbreak attacks than standard LLMs. In this paper, we investigate jailbreak attacks on LRMs and reveal that the attack success rate (ASR) is closely correlated with LRMs' attention patterns. Specifically, successful jailbreaks tend to assign lower attention to harmful tokens in the input prompt, while allocating higher attention to those tokens in the reasoning content. Motivated by this finding, we propose a novel jailbreak method for LRMs that leverages reinforcement learning (RL) to enhance attack effectiveness, explicitly incorporating attention signals into the reward function design. In addition, we introduce diverse persuasion strategies to enrich the RL action space, which consistently improves the ASR. Extensive experiments on five open-source and closed-source LRMs across three benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves substantially higher ASR, outperforming existing approaches in terms of effectiveness, efficiency, and transferability.

</details>


### [434] [Position: The Turing-Completeness of Real-World Autoregressive Transformers Relies Heavily on Context Management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19514)
*Guanyu Cui,Zhewei Wei,Kun He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文指出Transformer图灵完备性的证明常混用"固定系统设置"和"缩放族设置"两种情境，前者更符合实际LLM部署和图灵完备性标准定义，但现有证明多在后一情境下成立。作者形式化固定系统设置后论证缩放族证明无法确立真正图灵完备性，并揭示上下文管理方法对计算能力的关键影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献混淆了Transformer图灵完备性的两种不同证明情境，导致对结论的常见误解。作者希望澄清这种混淆，并强调上下文管理在实际部署中的核心作用。

Method: 形式化定义了"固定系统设置"（固定Transformer+固定上下文管理方法），并对比"缩放族设置"（不同模型族处理不同长度输入），通过理论分析论证两种设置下计算能力的本质差异。

Result: 指出缩放族设置下的图灵完备性证明虽提供理论资源界，但不符合图灵完备性的标准定义；不同上下文管理方法会导致显著不同的计算能力。

Conclusion: 上下文管理是决定实际自回归Transformer计算能力的关键组件，需重新审视现有图灵完备性结论的实际意义。

Abstract: Many works make the eye-catching claim that Transformers are Turing-complete. However, the literature often conflates two distinct settings: (i) a fixed Transformer system setting, in which a fixed autoregressive Transformer is coupled with a fixed context-management method to process inputs of different lengths step by step, and (ii) a scaling-family setting, in which a family of different models (with increasing context-window length or numerical precision) is used to handle different input lengths. Existing proofs of Transformer Turing-completeness are frequently established in setting (ii), whereas real-world LLM deployment and the standard notion of Turing-completeness correspond more naturally to setting (i). In this paper, we first formalize the fixed-system setting, thereby providing a concrete characterization of how real-world LLMs operate. We then argue that results proved in the scaling-family setting provide theoretically meaningful resource bounds but do not establish Turing-completeness, thereby clarifying a common misinterpretation of existing results. Finally, we show that different context-management methods can yield sharply different computational power, and we advocate the position that context management is a central component that critically determines the computational power of real-world autoregressive Transformers.

</details>


### [435] [BLINKG: A Benchmark for LLM-Integrated Knowledge Graph Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19518)
*Carla Castedo,Enrique Iglesias,Manuel Lama,Alberto Bugarin-Diz,Maria-Esther Vidal,David Chaves-Fraga*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出BLINKG基准，用于评估大语言模型在异构数据源构建知识图谱时的映射能力。实验表明LLM已有潜力，但在复杂场景下表现有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 知识图谱构建仍然耗时费力，需要人工对齐数据模式与本体术语。尽管LLM被探索用于自动化KG构建，但目前缺乏标准化评估框架来衡量LLM在建立数据模式与本体概念之间对应关系的有效性。

Method: 提出了BLINKG基准，包含一系列基于真实用例、复杂度递增的评估场景，用于测试LLM在KG构建中的映射能力，并利用该基准对多个SOTA LLM进行实验评估。

Result: LLM在KG构建中展现出有前景的解决方案，但在复杂场景下性能仍然受限。

Conclusion: BLINKG基准能够评估当前LLM在KG构建中的能力，并定义了实现（半）自动化LLM驱动KG构建的一系列需求，为后续研究开辟了新方向。

Abstract: Generating Knowledge Graphs (KGs) remains one of the most time-consuming and labor-intensive tasks for knowledge engineers, as they need to identify semantic equivalences between input data sources and ontology terms. While declarative solutions (e.g., RML, SPARQL-Anything) have helped to generalize this process, aligning input schema elements with ontology terms still involves intricate transformations and requires considerable manual effort. With the advent of Large Language Models (LLMs), there is growing interest in leveraging their capabilities to assist KG engineers. Although some studies have explored using LLMs to automate KG construction, there is still no standardized framework for assessing how effectively they establish correspondences between data schemes and ontology concepts. Therefore, in this paper, we propose BLINKG, a benchmark designed to evaluate the mapping capabilities of LLMs in constructing KGs from heterogeneous data sources. The benchmark includes a set of scenarios with increasing complexity, based on real-world use cases. We conduct an extensive experimental evaluation of several stateof-the-art LLMs using BLINK and observe that they already offer promising solutions. However, their performance remains limited in complex scenarios. Thanks to this benchmark, we can already assess the current capabilities of LLMs for KG construction. Additionally, we define a set of requirements for achieving (semi)automated (LLM-driven) KG construction, opening new research lines in this area.

</details>


### [436] [Efficient Elicitation of Collective Disagreements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19521)
*Mohamed Ouaguenouni,Felipe Garrido-Lucero,Umberto Grandi,César Hidalgo,Magdalena Tydrichova*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出"分层矩阵"框架，证明许多分歧度量需要至少3个子集的偏好信息才能表达，而传统的两两比较无法捕捉结构性分歧。作者设计了两种问卷协议来估计该矩阵，平衡参与人数与认知负荷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统调查中，两两比较无法区分结构性分歧与噪声，而完整排序虽信息丰富但认知负担重。作者希望找到最小的聚合偏好信息来准确计算分歧度量。

Method: 提出"分层矩阵"（plurality matrix）概念，记录每个子集S中各备选项排第一的概率。定义分歧度量的"层级"为所需最小子集大小，并设计两种估计分层矩阵的问卷协议。

Result: 证明rank-variance和divisiveness等现有分歧度量位于层级3，即两两比较（层级2）不足以表达。实验表明层级3以上能揭示更丰富的分歧结构。

Conclusion: 层次矩阵框架为分析群体分歧提供了更精细的工具，在理论上有助于理解分歧度量的信息需求，在实践上可通过设计合适的问卷协议平衡成本与信息量。

Abstract: We analyze the structure of the disagreement among a population of voters over a set of alternatives. Surveys typically ask either for pairwise comparisons, simple and intuitive for participants, or full rankings over alternatives, eliciting the entire voters' preferences. Building on the observation that pairwise comparisons cannot distinguish structural disagreement from noise, we propose a stratified framework to identify the minimal aggregated preference information needed to compute a number of disagreement measures from the literature. Specifically, we introduce the plurality matrix, a generalization of pairwise comparisons that records, for every subset $S$ of alternatives, the probability that each $a \in S$ ranks first in $S$. We define the level of a disagreement measure as the smallest subset size needed to express it, showing that many existing notions, including rank-variance and divisiveness, sit at level $3$, proving that pairwise comparisons are not enough. In addition, we demonstrate the interest of going beyond level $3$ both theoretically and experimentally. To make these results actionable, we design two elicitation protocols to estimate the plurality matrix, exploring the trade-off between the number of required participants and the cognitive load requested to each of them.

</details>


### [437] [Generative-Evaluative Agreement: A Necessary Validity Criterion for LLM-Enabled Adaptive Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19529)
*Grandee Lee,Yue Wang,Che Yee Lye,Luke Peh*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出生成-评估一致性（GEA）作为检验LLM自我评估有效性的新标准，在自适应评估中发现模型仅恢复约一半的预期方差（r=0.698），且对低技能水平存在系统性高估偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当同一个LLM既生成评估题目、模拟学生回答又进行评分时，验证环路是自我指涉的，缺乏独立的有效性检验标准。

Method: 提出GEA指标，衡量LLM的评分函数是否能恢复其生成函数被指令产生的技能水平。在两阶段自适应评估中直接测量GEA，并分析不同技能类型（语法可验证 vs. 设计级技能）的表现差异。

Result: 模型恢复约一半预期方差（r=0.698），存在系统性正偏倚；对语法可验证技能GEA较强（r>0.7），但对设计级技能接近零；低技能高估导致路由阈值附近的分数膨胀。

Conclusion: 细粒度、技能分解的评分标准是增强GEA的主要机制，并提出了补充缓解措施。

Abstract: When the same LLM generates assessment items, simulates student responses, and scores them, the validation loop is self-referential. We introduce Generative-Evaluative Agreement (GEA), a validity criterion measuring whether an LLM's scoring function recovers the skill levels its generative function was instructed to produce. In the first direct measurement of GEA on a two-stage adaptive assessment, the model recovers roughly half the intended variance r = 0.698 with systematic positive bias. GEA is strong r > 0.7 for syntactically verifiable skills but near zero for design-level skills, and low-skill overestimation inflates scores near the routing threshold. We argue that granular, skill-decomposed rubrics are the principal proposed mechanism for strengthening GEA and outline complementary mitigations.

</details>


### [438] [Library Drift: Diagnosing and Fixing a Silent Failure Mode in Self-Evolving LLM Skill Libraries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19576)
*Xing Zhang,Yanwei Cui,Guanghui Wang,Ziyuan Li,Wei Qiu,Bing Zhu,Peiyang He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本论文揭示了自进化技能库中的"库漂移"问题（技能无节制积累导致性能停滞），提供了可复现的触发机制、追踪级诊断工具，以及一个最小化治理方案（基于结果的淘汰+活跃容量上限+元技能创作先验），将MBPP+ hard-100上的pass@1从0.258提升至0.584。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自进化技能库存在"库漂移"这一隐性失败模式——技能无节制累积导致检索退化、假阳性注入和性能停滞。此前LLM撰写的技能收益+0.0pp而人工策划的技能收益+16.2pp（SkillsBench），但底层机制未被隔离分析。

Method: (1) 通过消融实验隔离漂移（禁用技能注入→平坦基线+0.002，强制提前淘汰→主动伤害-0.019）；(2) 仅追加证据日志，包含每技能贡献分数、归因判定和路由器参与度指标；(3) 最小治理方案：基于结果的淘汰+有界活跃容量+元技能创作先验。

Result: Hold-out pass@1从0.258基线提升至晚窗均值0.584（滚动增益+0.328），在MBPP+ hard-100上持续100轮。八项消融实验分解了各治理机制的承载作用与可替代性。

Conclusion: 提供了诊断自进化系统中库漂移的具体操作手册，验证了通过最小治理方案可以显著提升技能库的持续学习能力。

Abstract: Self-evolving skill libraries face a silent failure mode we term \emph{library drift}: unbounded skill accumulation without outcome-driven lifecycle management causes retrieval degradation, false-positive injections, and performance stagnation. Recent evaluation confirms the symptom--LLM-authored skills deliver +0.0pp gain while human-curated ones deliver +16.2pp (SkillsBench)--yet the underlying mechanism has not been isolated. We provide (1) a reproducible trigger: ablations that isolate drift--one disables skill injection (flat floor, +0.002), one imposes premature retirement (active harm, $-$0.019); (2) trace-level diagnostics: an append-only evidence log with per-skill contribution scores, attribution verdicts, and router engagement metrics that make the failure visible before it reaches end-task scores; and (3) a verified fix: a minimal governance recipe (outcome-driven retirement + bounded active-cap + meta-skill authoring prior) that lifts held-out pass@1 from a 0.258 baseline to a late-window mean of 0.584 (rolling gain $+$0.328) on MBPP+ hard-100 over 100 rounds. Eight ablations decompose which governance mechanisms are load-bearing and which are subsumed, providing a concrete playbook for diagnosing library drift in any self-evolving agent.

</details>


### [439] [SceneCode: Executable World Programs for Editable Indoor Scenes with Articulated Objects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19587)
*Puyi Wang,Yuhao Wang,Linjie Li,Zhengyuan Yang,Kevin Qinghong Lin,Yangguang Li,Yu Cheng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SceneCode 提出一种将自然语言提示编译为可执行程序化室内世界的方法，通过代码驱动生成具有物理交互能力的室内场景，替代传统静态网格资产。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有室内场景合成管线输出的静态网格缺乏物体级可控制性和可交互性，只能从精选资产库继承关节信息，无法按需生成可交互的新资产。

Method: 采用房间级智能体主干将提示转化为结构化房屋布局，通过规划器-设计器-评判器循环发出物体请求；每个请求路由到五种代码生成策略之一，转换为部件级Blender Python程序，经执行引导的修复精炼循环验证；最终编译为仿真就绪资产并导出SDF用于物理模拟。

Result: 在场景级合成、物体级资产质量、人工评估和下游机器人交互任务上验证，SceneCode生成的程序化世界在忠实提示的室内场景生成、更干净的网格结构以及可加载关节元数据方面表现更优。

Conclusion: 将场景合成从静态网格生成转向可执行程序化世界构建，显著提升了资产的可交互性和可控性，为具身AI和机器人仿真提供了新范式。

Abstract: Indoor scene synthesis underpins embodied AI, robotic manipulation, and simulation-based policy evaluation, where a useful scene must specify not only what the environment looks like, but also how its objects are structured. Existing pipelines, however, typically represent generated content as static meshes and inherit articulation only from curated asset libraries, which limits object-level controllability and prevents new interactable assets from being produced on demand. We address this gap by formulating physically interactable indoor scene synthesis as programmatic world generation, and present SceneCode, a framework that compiles a natural language prompt into an executable, code-driven indoor world rather than a collection of opaque meshes. A room-level agentic backbone first turns the prompt into a structured house layout and emits per-object AssetRequests through a planner--designer--critic loop. Each request is then routed to one of five code-generation strategies and converted into a synthesized part-wise Blender Python programs that are validated through an execution-guided repair-and-refine loop. The resulting programs are compiled into simulation-ready assets, and exported as SDF for physics simulation. A persistent scene-state registry links object requests, executable programs, rendered geometry, and simulation assets, turning scene assembly into a traceable and locally editable world-building process. We evaluate SceneCode across scene-level synthesis, object-level asset quality, human judgment, and downstream robot interaction. Results show that executable world programs improve prompt-faithful indoor scene generation and produce assets with cleaner mesh structure, and simulator-loadable articulation metadata. Project page: https://scene-code.github.io/.

</details>


### [440] [Towards Multi-Model LLM Schedulers: Empirical Insights into Offloading and Preemption](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19593)
*Mert Yildiz,Pietro Spadaccino,Alexey Rolich,Francesca Cuomo,Andrea Baiocchi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了在异构硬件上部署多种LLM时，模型层卸载和抢占对性能的影响。发现卸载导致非线性且模型相关的解码吞吐下降，小模型对GPU驻留减少更敏感；抢占开销主要由模型状态重载而非KV缓存传输主导，且在不同模型和硬件间差异显著。基于这些发现，本文提出了未来调度器需考虑的关键特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有系统主要针对单一模型优化吞吐量，但实际部署中需要同时在共享异构硬件上服务多种架构、规模和专业化的LLM。在多模型、混合CPU-GPU执行场景下，资源分配、调度和GPU内存约束（部分卸载和抢占）带来的挑战尚未被充分研究。

Method: 采用实证研究方法，系统性地测量了不同LLM在不同硬件平台上的行为表现，重点分析了层卸载和抢占对解码吞吐量的影响，以及序列长度和互连带宽对数据移动和执行效率的放大作用。

Result: 1) 卸载导致强非线性且模型相关的解码吞吐下降，小模型对GPU驻留减少更敏感；2) 抢占开销主要来源于模型状态重载而非KV缓存传输；3) 序列长度和互连带宽显著影响数据移动和执行效率。

Conclusion: 未来调度器必须考虑模型特定的卸载敏感性、工作负载特征以及抢占和数据传输的成本结构，以高效管理异构、多模型工作负载的混合CPU-GPU执行。

Abstract: Modern deployments of Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly require serving multiple models with diverse architectures, sizes, and specialization on shared, heterogeneous hardware. This setting introduces new challenges for resource allocation, dispatching, and scheduling, particularly under GPU memory constraints where partial CPU-GPU offloading and preemption become necessary. While existing systems primarily optimize throughput for a single model, comparatively little work addresses multi-model scheduling under these conditions. In this paper, we present an empirical study of how different LLMs behave across hardware platforms, focusing on the performance implications of layer offloading and preemption. We show that offloading leads to strongly non-linear and model-dependent degradation in decode throughput, with smaller models exhibiting sharper sensitivity to reduced GPU residency. We further demonstrate that preemption incurs substantial overhead, largely dominated by model state reload rather than key-value cache transfer, and that this cost varies significantly across models and hardware platforms. Additionally, we highlight the role of sequence length and interconnect bandwidth in amplifying data movement and execution inefficiencies. Based on these findings, we identify a set of key features that future schedulers must consider, including model-specific offloading sensitivity, workload characteristics, and the cost structure of preemption and data transfer. These insights provide guidance for the design of next-generation LLM serving systems capable of efficiently managing heterogeneous, multi-model workloads with hybrid CPU-GPU execution.

</details>


### [441] [Formal Skill: Programmable Runtime Skills for Efficient and Accurate LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19604)
*Xi Zhang,Meijun Gao,Yuntian Zhao,Xinyu Tan,Yilun Yao,Feiyu Wang,Yanshu Wang,Dingsiyi,Tong Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Formal Skill——一种将可复用流程从提示文本迁移到可执行状态机与钩子策略的运行时抽象，并基于FairyClaw框架实现，在Harness-Bench上以更少token获得高竞争力分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM Agent的技能表达方式存在局限：Markdown技能文档和指令包过于非形式化，函数调用/MCP/框架工具虽结构化但将工作流状态、策略执行和完成纪律留在技能外部，缺乏统一、可执行的技能抽象。

Method: 提出Formal Skill抽象，包含JSON元数据与动作模式、可执行Python执行器、钩子治理控制逻辑、Formal Skill路由以及技能本地运行时状态；并在FairyClaw（开源事件驱动运行时）中实现该抽象。

Result: 在Harness-Bench上，FairyClaw以显著更少的token消耗获得极具竞争力的平均分数，尤其在与Formal Skill直接相关的任务上表现突出。

Conclusion: Formal Skill通过将可复用流程编码为可执行状态机与钩子策略，为Agent提供了token高效、可强制执行的控制器面，显著提升了效率与可控性。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents increasingly act inside real workspaces, where tools and skills determine whether model reasoning becomes reliable action. Existing skills remain largely informal: Markdown skills and instruction packs encode procedures as long natural-language documents, while function calling, Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, and framework tools structure individual actions but usually leave workflow state, policy enforcement, and completion discipline outside the skill itself. We introduce Formal Skill, a runtime-native abstraction that represents reusable capability with JSON metadata and action schemas, reliable Python executors, hook-governed control logic, Formal Skill routing, and skill-local runtime state. By moving reusable procedure from repeated prompt text into executable state machines and hook policies, Formal Skill gives agents a token-efficient and enforceable control surface. We implement the abstraction in FairyClaw, an open-source event-driven runtime for executable, observable, and composable Formal Skills. On Harness-Bench, FairyClaw obtains highly competitive average scores while using substantially fewer tokens, with especially strong results on tasks that expose the role of Formal Skill.

</details>


### [442] [EMO-BOOST: Emotion-Augmented Audio-Visual Features for Improved Generalization in Deepfake Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19630)
*Aritra Marik,Marcel Klemt,Anna Rohrbach*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文提出Emo-Boost框架，利用情感作为高层语义线索来增强深度伪造检测的跨操作泛化能力，通过融合情感检测器与传统RGB-音频检测器，在FakeAVCeleb数据集上实现了2.1%的AUC提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法难以泛化到训练中未见过的伪造类型，因为新的生成技术层出不穷，无法为每种操作收集训练数据。作者希望利用高层语义线索（如情感）来提升检测器的泛化能力。

Method: 提出Emo-Boost多模态深度伪造检测框架，包含两部分：1) EmoForensics情感检测器，利用视觉和音频情感识别模块建模音视频流中情感表征的模态内和模态间时间一致性；2) 融合现有的RGB和音频深度伪造检测器，将情感信号与低级特征信号结合。

Result: 在FakeAVCeleb数据集上，Emo-Boost将跨操作泛化的平均AUC提升了2.1%。实验表明情感信号与低级特征信号具有互补性。

Conclusion: 高层语义线索（如情感）能够有效支持低级特征方法在深度伪造检测中泛化到未见过的伪造类型，多模态融合策略具有显著优势。

Abstract: With every advancement in generative AI models, forensics is under increasing pressure. The constant emergence of new generation techniques makes it impossible to collect data for each manipulation to train a deepfake detection model. Thus, generalizing to deepfakes unseen during training is one of the major challenges in current deepfake detection research. To tackle this challenge, we employ high-level semantic cues and argue that these cues can support low-level focused approaches in generalizing to unseen types of manipulations. In this work, we study emotions as a high-level semantic cue. We propose Emo-Boost, a multimodal deepfake detection framework that fuses an off-the-shelf RGB- and acoustic-focused deepfake detector with our emotion-based deepfake detector EmoForensics. EmoForensics utilises vision and audio emotion recognition modules and models intra- and inter-modal temporal consistency in emotion representations from an audio-visual stream. We found that EmoForensics and the low-level focused method capture complementary signals. Consequently, combining both signals in EmoBoost enhances the average cross-manipulation generalization AUC by 2.1% on FakeAVCeleb.

</details>


### [443] [When Tabular Foundation Models Meet Strategic Tabular Data: A Prior Alignment Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19662)
*Xinpeng Lv,Yunxin Mao,Renzhe Xu,Chunyuan Zheng,Yikai Chen,Haoxuan Li,Jinxuan Yang,Kun Kuang,Yuanlong Chen,Mingyang Geng,Wanrong Huang,Shixuan Liu,Shaowu Yang,Wenjing Yang,Zhouchen Lin,Haotian Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出SPN框架，在推理阶段将表格基础模型适配到策略性环境，无需重新训练即可应对个体策略性特征修改导致的分布偏移问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的表格基础模型（基于PFN）在非策略性场景表现良好，但现实决策中个体可能策略性修改特征以获得有利结果，导致部署后分布偏移。需要研究PFN能否泛化到策略性表格数据，并解决非策略性先验与策略性先验之间的不匹配问题。

Method: 提出Strategic Prior-data Fitted Network (SPN)，一种推理时策略感知框架。通过构建策略性上下文示例来近似操纵后的输入，将PFN预测与诱导的策略性分布对齐，无需重新训练模型。

Result: 在真实和合成表格数据集上，SPN在策略性操纵下相比表格基础模型和经典表格方法，持续提升了鲁棒性和预测性能。

Conclusion: SPN有效解决了PFN在策略性场景下的先验不匹配问题，为表格基础模型在现实决策场景中的应用提供了可行的推理时适配方案。

Abstract: Tabular foundation models based on pretrained prior-data fitted networks~(PFNs) have shown strong generalization on diverse tabular tasks, but they are typically designed for \emph{non-strategic} settings where data distributions are independent of deployed classifiers. In many real-world decision scenarios, however, individuals may strategically modify their features after deployment to obtain favorable outcomes, inducing a post-deployment distribution shift. This paper studies whether PFN-style tabular foundation models can generalize to such \emph{strategic} tabular data. We show that strategic manipulation creates a mismatch between the non-strategic prior learned during pretraining and the post-manipulation strategic prior, which leads to systematic prediction bias. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{Strategic Prior-data Fitted Network}~\textit{(SPN)}, an inference-time strategy-aware framework that adapts tabular foundation models to strategic environments without retraining. SPN constructs strategic in-context examples to approximate post-manipulation inputs and aligns PFN predictions with the induced strategic distribution. Experiments on real-world and synthetic tabular datasets show that SPN consistently improves robustness and predictive performance under strategic manipulation compared with both tabular foundation models and classical tabular methods.

</details>


### [444] [Pseudocode-Guided Structured Reasoning for Automating Reliable Inference in Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19663)
*Weicong Ni,Tianbao Jiang,Linlin Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PStar框架，通过伪代码引导的结构化推理和难度特征向量，让VLMs自适应选择推理策略，显著减少幻觉，在POPE和MMStar上达到SOTA性能，超越GPT-4V。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLMs在机器人自动化中至关重要，但其幻觉问题在物理部署中带来严重安全风险，且真实任务的开放性和难度多样性需要稳健的推理策略。

Method: 设计抽象推理函数库和结构化伪代码库，并引入难度特征向量(DFV)评估问题复杂度，使模型自适应选择推理路径，实现灵活、逐步的推理。

Result: POPE上87.1%，MMStar上68.0%，均超越GPT-4V，显著降低幻觉率。

Conclusion: PStar为降低视觉-语言错误提供了有效机制，是向更可信、确定性的VLMs部署迈出的关键一步，对减少真实自动化系统中的灾难性错误具有重要意义。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are becoming the cornerstone of high-level reasoning for robotic automation, enabling robots to parse natural language commands and perceive their environments. However, their susceptibility to hallucinations introduces critical failures in decision-making, posing significant safety and reliability risks in physical deployments. This challenge is exacerbated by the open-ended nature of real-world tasks, where questions vary vastly in difficulty and modality, demanding robust and adaptable reasoning strategies. To tackle this, we propose the Pseudocode-guided Structured Reasoning framework (PStar), which adaptively selects structured pseudocode reasoning paths to help VLMs perform flexible and step-by-step reasoning. We first design a set of abstract reasoning functions and formulate a structured pseudocode library to represent modular reasoning strategies. Crucially, we design a Difficulty Feature Vector (DFV) that allows the model to assess question complexity and adaptively choose appropriate reasoning strategies-enhancing robustness and interpretability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PStar significantly reduces hallucination rates, achieving state-of-the-art scores of 87.1% on POPE and 68.0% on MMStar, outperforming even GPT-4V. By providing a validated mechanism to reduce visual-language errors, PStar offers a critical step toward deploying more trustworthy and deterministic VLMs for real-world automated systems, where such errors can lead to catastrophic outcomes.

</details>


### [445] [Transforming Constraint Programs to Input for Local Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19671)
*Jo Devriendt,Patrick De Causmaecker,Marc Denecker*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种从约束优化问题的对称性自动生成局部搜索邻域的方法，并在IDP系统中实现，通过六个经典问题的实验验证了该技术的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上，将局部搜索算法应用于组合优化问题需要人工干预来编译约束，过程繁琐且易出错。本文旨在建立约束优化问题的对称性与局部搜索邻域之间的联系，从而实现邻域的自动生成，减少人工成本。

Method: 论文建立了约束优化问题的对称性与局部搜索邻域之间的理论联系，基于此在IDP系统中实现了从约束规约自动生成邻域的技术，并通过六个经典优化问题进行了实验评估。

Result: 在六个经典优化问题上的实验结果表明，该方法能够自动生成有效的局部搜索邻域，支持了该技术的可行性。

Conclusion: 利用约束优化问题的对称性自动生成局部搜索邻域是可行的，这为减少人工干预、提高局部搜索算法的易用性提供了新途径。

Abstract: Applying local search algorithms to combinatorial optimization problems is not an easy feat. Typically, human intervention is required to compile the constraints to input data for some metaheuristic algorithm. In this paper, we establish a link between symmetry properties of constraint optimization problems and local search neighborhoods, and we use this link to automatically generate neighborhoods from a constraint specification in the context of the IDP system. We evaluate the obtained neighborhoods for six classical optimization problems. The resulting observations support the viability of this technique.

</details>


### [446] [Beyond Rational Illusion: Behaviorally Realistic Strategic Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19674)
*Xinpeng Lv,Yunxin Mao,Renzhe Xu,Chunyuan Zheng,Yikai Chen,Haoxuan Li,Yang Shi,Jinxuan Yang,Zhouchen Lin,Yuanlong Chen,Yuanxing Zhang,Shaowu Yang,Wenjing Yang,Haotian Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出行为现实主义战略分类问题，并基于前景理论提出Pro-SF框架，通过引入收益-成本不对称、主观参考点和非理性概率扭曲三种机制来建模非完全理性的策略性操纵行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有战略分类研究假设代理人是完全理性的，但行为经济学和心理学证据表明现实中的决策常受认知偏差影响，与纯粹理性相悖。本文旨在弥补这一理论与现实之间的差距。

Method: 提出Pro-SF（前景引导战略框架），以前景理论为基础，在Stackelberg博弈交互中引入三种机制：收益与成本的不对称感知、不同的主观参考点、非理性的概率扭曲，从而建模行为现实主义的策略性响应。

Result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上的实验表明，Pro-SF能够有效建模行为现实主义下的策略性分类问题，验证了其作为行为基础方法的有效性。

Conclusion: Pro-SF为战略分类提供了一种行为现实主义方法，弥合了机器学习与行为经济学之间的鸿沟，使得模型在现实部署中更加可靠。

Abstract: Strategic classification(SC) studies the interaction between decision models and agents who strategically manipulate their features for favorable outcomes. Existing SC frameworks typically rely on the idealized assumption that agents are strictly rational. However, evidence from behavioral economics and psychology consistently shows that real-world decision-making is often shaped by cognitive biases, deviating from pure rationality. To formalize this limitation, we identify and define a new problem setting, termed the behaviorally realistic strategic classification problem, where agents' strategic manipulations deviate from full rationality due to psychological biases. Motivated by the identified limitation, we propose the Prospect-Guided Strategic Framework (Pro-SF) to address the problem, a principled framework grounded in prospect theory to model and learn under behaviorally realistic strategic responses. Specifically, to capture behaviorally realistic strategic manipulations, our framework reformulates the Stackelberg-style interaction between agents and the decision-maker by incorporating three key mechanisms inspired by prospect theory, including the asymmetry between benefits and costs, different subjective reference points, and non-rational probability distortion. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets establish Pro-SF as a behaviorally grounded approach to strategic classification, bridging machine learning and behavioral economics for more reliable deployment in the real world.

</details>


### [447] [Projecting Latent RL Actions: Towards Generalizable and Scalable Graph Combinatorial Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19721)
*Franco Terranova,Guillermo Bernardez,Albert Cabellos-Aparicio,Nina Miolane,Abdelkader Lahmadi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出投影智能体（Projection Agents），一种基于连续GNN动作嵌入空间的强化学习方法，用于解决图组合优化问题，在推理速度（最高16.2倍）和泛化能力（最高40%提升）上显著优于现有方法，并发布了LaGCO-RL库以促进可复现性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL-GCO方法面临两大挑战：跨图实例的泛化能力不足，以及动作空间增长时的计算可扩展性问题。作者旨在同时解决这两个问题。

Method: 提出投影智能体（Projection Agents），在连续的GNN动作嵌入空间中直接操作，通过单次前向传播预测期望的潜在动作，再解码为有效的离散动作；并建立共享的观测和动作嵌入空间以实现不同RL方法的公平比较。

Result: 在多个基准测试上，推理速度提升最高达16.2倍，泛化能力提升最高达40%，仅使用简单的最近邻解码即可实现。在具有多个相互依赖变量的超线性决策空间中也能取得强RL性能。

Conclusion: 所提方法有效突破了现有RL-GCO在泛化和可扩展性上的瓶颈，且发布的LaGCO-RL库有助于推动该领域的可复现性和新基准的适配。

Abstract: Graph combinatorial optimization (GCO) has attracted growing interest, as many NP-hard problems naturally admit graph formulations, yet their combinatorial explosion renders exact methods computationally intractable. Recent advances in Reinforcement Learning (RL) combined with Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have significantly improved learning-based GCO solvers. However, existing approaches face limitations in both generalization across diverse graph instances and computational scalability as action spaces grow. To address both challenges, we introduce projection agents, a novel RL-GCO approach that operates directly in a continuous GNN-based action embedding space, predicting a desired latent action in a single forward pass and subsequently decoding it into a valid discrete action. Additionally, we enable fair comparison across RL methods through a shared embedding space for both observations and actions. Across diverse benchmarks, our approach achieves up to 16.2x faster inference and up to 40% better generalization than existing solutions using only simple nearest-neighbor decoding, while opening the door to strong RL performance in super-linear decision spaces with multiple interdependent variables. Finally, we release LaGCO-RL, a Python library that automates latent action-space construction and supports existing RL-GCO solutions, promoting reproducibility and adaptation to new GCO benchmarks.

</details>


### [448] [CogScale: Scalable Benchmark for Sequence Processing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19758)
*Yannis Bendi-Ouis,Romain de Coudenhove,Xavier Hinaut*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出CogScale，一个包含14个可扩展合成任务的新基准，用于评估不同架构的认知与记忆能力。在严格参数预算下测试了7种架构，发现经典RNN在基础保留任务上表现优异，但只有注意力和现代状态空间模型能在推理复杂度增加时保持高性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估新架构的认知和记忆能力需要大规模数据集和模型，计算成本高昂且迭代缓慢，缺乏一个标准化、轻量级的评估框架来快速验证架构创新。

Method: 提出了CogScale基准，包含14个可扩展的合成任务，能隔离评估特定的认知和记忆能力，并在不同参数规模（1k、10k、100k）下对GRU、LSTM、xLSTM、ESN、Mamba、Transformer Decoder和Transformer Encoder-Decoder七种架构进行系统评估。

Result: 经典RNN（GRU、LSTM）和ESN在严格参数预算下基础保留任务表现优异；但只有注意力机制（Transformer系列）和现代状态空间模型（Mamba）能在推理复杂度和任务难度增加时持续保持高性能。

Conclusion: CogScale为快速验证架构创新提供了轻量级标准化评估框架，有助于研究人员在投入大规模训练前筛选有潜力的架构方向，并揭示了不同架构在可扩展认知任务上的能力差异。

Abstract: The ability to maintain and manipulate information over time is a fundamental aspect of living beings and Artificial Intelligence. While modern models have achieved remarkable success in tasks like natural language processing, evaluating the capacity of novel architectures to process sequential information remains computationally expensive and time-consuming. Testing a new architecture often requires scaling up to massive datasets and models, leading to vast computational costs and slow iteration cycles. In this paper, we propose CogScale, a benchmark of 14 scalable synthetic tasks designed to isolate and evaluate specific cognitive and memory abilities at different parametrizable scales. By providing a standardized, lightweight framework, CogScale allows researchers to rapidly validate architectural innovations before committing to large-scale training. To establish a solid baseline, we evaluate seven distinct architectures: Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU), Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), xLSTM, Echo State Network (ESN), Mamba, Transformer Decoder, and Transformer Encoder-Decoder. These evaluations are conducted under strict parameter budgets (1k, 10k, and 100k) and across different difficulty levels and scales. Our results show that while classical RNNs and Echo State Networks excel at basic retention within strict parameter budgets, only attention mechanisms and modern state-space models consistently maintain high performance as reasoning complexity and task difficulty scale.

</details>


### [449] [What Really Improves Mathematical Reasoning: Structured Reasoning Signals Beyond Pure Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19762)
*Yuze Zhao,Junpeng Fang,Lu Yu,Zhenya Huang,Kai Zhang,Qing Cui,Qi Liu,Jun Zhou,Enhong Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过控制预训练实验发现：代码主要提升编程能力而非通用推理能力；推理提升更多来自跨领域结构化推理轨迹（如代码-文本、数学-文本混合）而非可执行代码本身；在固定数学预算内增加结构化数学样本密度可显著提升复杂数学推理能力，同时保持编程性能。路由分析进一步揭示了跨领域竞争与协同的机制证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究声称代码训练能改善语言模型的推理能力，但其背后的因果机制尚不明确。作者希望通过精细控制的预训练实验，厘清代码在模型能力提升中的真正作用，区分代码本身与跨领域结构化推理轨迹的影响。

Method: 在10T token的语料上进行可控预训练实验，采用细粒度领域分离的数据划分，通过隔离代码、代码-文本混合、数学-文本混合等不同数据成分，系统评估各成分对编程能力、推理能力和知识密集型任务的影响。同时使用路由分析（routing analyses）从机制层面观察数据组合效应在专家激活模式上的反映。

Result: (1) 代码主要提升编程能力，并非通用推理增强器，甚至与知识密集型任务（特别是复杂数学推理）存在竞争关系；(2) 推理增益更多来自于跨领域的结构化推理轨迹（如代码-文本、数学-文本混合数据），而非可执行代码本身；(3) 在固定数学预算内提高结构化数学样本的密度，能显著提升困难数学推理性能，同时很好保持编程性能；(4) 路由分析显示数据组合效应体现在专家激活模式上，为跨领域竞争与协同提供了机制层面的证据。

Conclusion: 本文澄清了哪些数据特征能够跨能力维度迁移，哪些不能，为更精准的数据中心优化策略提供了指导。代码本身并非推理的通用催化剂，结构化的跨领域推理轨迹才是关键，这启示未来预训练数据配比应更注重结构化推理数据的质量而非简单的代码量增加。

Abstract: Code has become a standard component of modern foundation language model (LM) training, yet its role beyond programming remains unclear. We revisit the claim that code improves reasoning through controlled pretraining experiments on a 10T-token corpus with fine-grained domain separation. Our findings are threefold. First, when code is restricted to standalone executable programs and Code-NL data are controlled for, code substantially improves programming ability but does not act as a general reasoning enhancer; instead, it competes with knowledge-intensive tasks, especially complex mathematical reasoning. Second, the reasoning gains often attributed to code are better explained by cross-domain structured reasoning traces, such as code-text and math-text mixtures, rather than by executable code alone. Third, increasing the density of structured math-domain samples within a fixed math budget yields substantial gains on difficult mathematical reasoning while largely preserving programming performance, suggesting that cognitive scaffolds offer a targeted way to mitigate cross-domain trade-offs. Finally, routing analyses show that data-composition effects are reflected in expert-activation patterns, providing mechanism-level evidence for competitive and synergistic interactions across domains. Our results clarify which data characteristics transfer across capability dimensions and point to more precise data-centric optimization strategies.

</details>


### [450] [GroupAffect-4: A Multimodal Dataset of Four-Person Collaborative Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19765)
*Meisam Jamshidi Seikavandi,Alice Modica,Anna Obara,Shan Ahmed Shaffi,Fabricio Batista Narcizo,Tanya Ignatenko,Ted Vucurevich,Karim Haddad,Daniel Barratt,Daniel Overholt,Jesper Bunsow Boldt,Paolo Burelli,Andrew Burke Dittberner*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GroupAffect-4是包含40名参与者、10个四人小组的多模态情感语料库，记录了他们在四项协作任务中的生理、眼动、音频、自我报告和人格数据，支持个体、人际和群体层面的情感分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语料库多聚焦单一层面，缺乏能够同时支持个体、人际和群体层面情感耦合分析的多模态数据集。

Method: 收集40人在10个四人小组中完成信息汇集、协商、创意生成和公共物品游戏四项任务，同步采集腕部生理传感器、眼动追踪眼镜、近讲麦克风音频、持续情感自评、任务后问卷和大五人格评分，所有数据时间对齐，并以BIDS标准格式发布。

Result: 生理数据覆盖率超过91%，眼动数据覆盖率98%；协商任务的情感操控检验验证了任务效度；定义了15个覆盖个体状态、人际特质和群体动态的基准目标并报告了基线结果。

Conclusion: GroupAffect-4为多层面小组情感计算研究提供了高质量、标准化的公开数据集，代码和数据均已开放获取。

Abstract: Existing affective-computing, social-signal-processing, and meeting corpora capture important parts of human interaction, but they rarely support analysis of affect in co-located groups as a coupled individual, interpersonal, and group-level process. The required signals (per-participant physiology, eye movement, audio, self-report, task outcomes, and personality) are usually fragmented across separate dataset traditions. We introduce GroupAffect-4, a multimodal corpus of 40 participants in 10 four-person groups, each completing four ecologically varied collaborative tasks spanning information pooling, negotiation, idea generation, and a public-goods game. Each participant is instrumented with a wrist-worn physiology sensor, eye-tracking glasses, and a close-talk microphone; sessions include continuous affect self-reports, post-task questionnaires, task outcomes, and Big-Five personality scores, all time-aligned to a shared clock. The dataset covers over 91% of expected physiology windows and 98% of eye-tracking windows, with strong task validity confirmed by a clear affective manipulation check across the negotiation block. We define fifteen benchmarkable targets spanning three analysis levels -- within-person state, between-person traits, and group dynamics -- and report leave-one-group-out feasibility baselines establishing the dataset's evaluative scope. GroupAffect-4 is released with a BIDS-inspired structure, Croissant metadata, a datasheet, per-session quality reports, and open processing scripts. Code and processing scripts are available at https://github.com/meisamjam/GroupAffect-4; the dataset is publicly archived at https://zenodo.org/records/20037847.

</details>


### [451] [Minimax Optimal Variance-Aware Regret Bounds for Multinomial Logistic MDPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19768)
*Pierre Boudart,Pierre Gaillard,Alessandro Rudi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文针对转移概率由多项逻辑模型(MNL)建模的episodic MDPs，提出了一个依赖问题常数σ̄_T的算法，将遗憾界从Õ(dH²√T)改进为Õ(dH²σ̄_T√T)，并证明了匹配的下界，首次全面刻画了MNL混合MDPs的遗憾复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MNL混合MDPs算法的最坏情况遗憾界为Õ(dH²√T)，但未充分利用问题结构信息。受logistic bandit研究中利用方差信息改进遗憾的启发，作者希望引入问题依赖常数来刻画转移模型的不确定性，从而在结构化MDPs（如KL约束鲁棒MDP）中取得更紧的遗憾界。

Method: 提出一种新算法，引入问题依赖常数σ̄_T ≤ 1/2，度量最优下游值函数沿学习轨迹的归一化平均方差。算法基于这一方差信息动态调整探索与利用策略，从而在结构化环境中获得更优的遗憾上界。

Result: (1) 算法实现Õ(dH²σ̄_T√T)遗憾上界，最坏情况下退化为现有界Õ(dH²√T)，结构化(如KL约束鲁棒MDP)下σ̄_T=O(H⁻¹)，使H因子降低一个阶；(2) 证明匹配的Ω(dH²σ̄_T√T)下界，实现极小极大最优性。

Conclusion: 首次完整刻画MNL混合MDPs的遗憾复杂度，揭示了问题依赖常数σ̄_T在刻画该模型学习难度中的核心作用，为未来该方向提供了理论基础和算法基准。

Abstract: We study reinforcement learning for episodic Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) whose transitions are modelled by a multinomial logistic (MNL) model. Existing algorithms for MNL mixture MDPs yield a regret of $\smash{\tilde{O}(dH^2\sqrt{T})}$ (Li et al., 2024), where $d$ is the feature dimension, $H$ the episode length, and $T$ the number of episodes. Inspired by the logistic bandit literature (Abeille et al., 2021; Faury et al., 2022; Boudart et al., 2026), we introduce a problem-dependent constant $\barσ\_T \leq 1/2$, measuring the normalised average variance of the optimal downstream value function along the learner's trajectory. We propose an algorithm achieving a regret of $\smash{\tilde{O}(dH^2\barσ\_T\sqrt{T})}$, which recovers the existing bound in the worst case and improves upon it for structured MDPs. For instance, for KL-constrained robust MDPs, $\barσ\_T = O(H^{-1})$, reducing the horizon dependence by a factor $H$. We further establish a matching $\smash{Ω(dH^2\barσ\_T\sqrt{T})}$ lower bound, proving minimax optimality (up to logarithmic factors) and fully characterising the regret complexity of MNL mixture MDPs for the first time.

</details>


### [452] [OpenComputer: Verifiable Software Worlds for Computer-Use Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19769)
*Jinbiao Wei,Qianran Ma,Yilun Zhao,Xiao Zhou,Kangqi Ni,Guo Gan,Arman Cohan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: OpenComputer是一个基于验证器的框架，用于构建可验证的软件世界，涵盖33个桌面应用和1000个任务，通过硬编码验证器实现比LLM判官更精准的评估，揭示了前沿智能体在端到端任务完成上的不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有计算机使用智能体缺乏可靠的自动化验证机制，LLM-as-judge评估方式在细粒度应用状态判断上不够准确，需要构建可验证的软件世界来客观评估智能体能力。

Method: 提出OpenComputer框架，集成四个组件：应用特定状态验证器、自演化验证层、任务生成流水线和评估框架，覆盖33个桌面应用的1000个任务。

Result: 硬编码验证器比LLM-as-judge更接近人类判断；前沿智能体端到端完成率低，开源模型相比OSWorld-Verified分数大幅下降。

Conclusion: OpenComputer提供了更可靠的智能体评估方式，暴露了当前计算机自动化中鲁棒性的持续差距。

Abstract: We present OpenComputer, a verifier-grounded framework for constructing verifiable software worlds for computer-use agents. OpenComputer integrates four components: (1) app-specific state verifiers that expose structured inspection endpoints over real applications, (2) a self-evolving verification layer that improves verifier reliability using execution-grounded feedback, (3) a task-generation pipeline that synthesizes realistic and machine-checkable desktop tasks, and (4) an evaluation harness that records full trajectories and computes auditable partial-credit rewards. In its current form, OpenComputer covers 33 desktop applications and 1,000 finalized tasks spanning browsers, office tools, creative software, development environments, file managers, and communication applications. Experiments show that OpenComputer's hard-coded verifiers align more closely with human adjudication than LLM-as-judge evaluation, especially when success depends on fine-grained application state. Frontier agents struggle with end-to-end completion despite partial progress, and open-source models exhibit sharp drops from their OSWorld-Verified scores, exposing a persistent gap in robust computer automation.

</details>


### [453] [Distribution-Free Uncertainty Quantification for Continuous AI Agent Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19779)
*Yuxuan Gao,Megan Wang,Yi Ling Yu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文针对AI智能体连续评估场景，将分裂共形预测和自适应共形推断（ACI）适配为分布无关的覆盖保证方法。在24小时预测窗口下，共形区间的校准误差低于0.02；ACI在智能体发布后能自适应拓宽区间35%并收敛。进一步提出多智能体管道的组合不确定性界（验证跨阶段相关性rho∈[-0.5,0.9]）、控制错误排序率的共形弃权规则，以及面向排行榜多重检验的FDR校正弃权。基于50个智能体、每小时18个实时信号的评估表明，各智能体条件覆盖率围绕标称水平集中（均值80.4%，90%的智能体落在[72%,90%]），跨源情感分歧可预测排序不稳定性（r=0.64, p<0.01）。循环控制验证表明框架能捕获超越基准的信号（rho_s=0.52, p<0.01, n=35）。代码与数据以CC BY 4.0发布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI智能体评估缺乏可靠的统计保证，预测的质量评分区间难以提供覆盖保证，且在智能体发布后区间宽度无法自适应调整。同时，多智能体管道的组合不确定性、排序决策的误差控制及大规模多重检验等问题尚未得到有效解决。

Method: 将分裂共形预测（split conformal prediction）和自适应共形推断（ACI）扩展到AI智能体连续评估场景；提出多智能体管道的组合不确定性界（通过仿真验证跨阶段相关性）；设计共形弃权规则以控制成对排序的错误排序率；采用FDR校正弃权方法处理排行榜级多重检验。

Result: 24小时窗口下校准误差<0.02；ACI在智能体发布后区间宽度自适应增加35%并收敛；智能体条件覆盖率集中（均值80.4%，90%智能体在[72%,90%]）；跨源情感分歧与排序不稳定性显著相关（r=0.64, p<0.01）；循环控制验证显示框架超越基准（rho_s=0.52, p<0.01）。

Conclusion: 本文为AI智能体连续评估提供了分布无关的统计保证框架，能够自适应处理智能体发布带来的不确定性变化，并有效控制排序和多重检验中的错误率，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: We adapt split conformal prediction and adaptive conformal inference (ACI) to continuous AI agent evaluation, providing distribution-free coverage guarantees for forecasted quality scores. Conformal intervals achieve calibration error below 0.02 across all nominal levels at the 24h horizon, while ACI correctly widens intervals by 35% following agent releases then reconverges. We further develop compositional uncertainty bounds for multi-agent pipelines (validated via simulation across inter-stage correlations rho in [-0.5, 0.9]), a conformal abstention rule for pairwise rankings with controlled false-ranking rate, and FDR-corrected abstention for leaderboard-scale multiple testing. Evaluating 50 agents via 18 real-time signals collected hourly, we show that per-agent conditional coverage is well-concentrated around the nominal level (mean 80.4%, 90% of agents within [72%, 90%]), and that cross-source sentiment divergence predicts ranking instability (r=0.64, p<0.01). A circularity-controlled validation confirms the framework captures signal beyond benchmarks (rho_s=0.52, p<0.01, n=35). Code and data are released under CC BY 4.0.

</details>


### [454] [From SGD to Muon: Adaptive Optimization via Schatten-p Norms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19781)
*Thomas Massena,Corentin Friedrich,Mathieu Serrurier*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于数据的动态LMO几何选择方法，通过在训练过程中根据梯度/激活统计自适应选择最优更新几何，统一了SGD、Muon、Adam等优化器，仅带来约3%的开销，性能与Muon/AdamW的最佳者持平或更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有优化器（如Muon）对每层施加固定的矩阵级几何约束（LMO几何），但这些几何是人为或经验选定的，未必适配具体问题的几何特性。作者希望根据运行时的数据动态选择最优的LMO几何。

Method: 1) 构建一个从SGD到Muon插值的LMO几何设计空间；2) 利用梯度与激活统计，通过单步随机特征回归代理模型推导闭式解，动态选择近似最优的LMO几何；3) 引入参数级预条件，使框架能恢复SGD、Muon、Adam、MuAdam等作为特例；4) 采用高效计算策略，仅增加约3%运行时间开销。

Result: 在三种不同训练场景下，该方法与Muon和AdamW中表现最佳者相比，要么更优，要么具有竞争力。运行时开销仅约3%。

Conclusion: LMO几何可以成功且高效地从运行时数据中自适应调整，为超越静态几何的优化器设计开辟了新路径。

Abstract: Modern optimizers, like Muon, impose matrix-wise geometry constraints on their updates. These matrix-wise constraints can be unified under Linear Minimization Oracle (LMO) theory. However, all current methods impose fixed LMO geometries for the update rules, chosen by-design or empirically, which are not necessarily optimal according to the problem's geometry. We introduce a novel efficient datadriven criterion for dynamically choosing proxy-optimal update LMO geometries on individual Deep Neural Network layers. Derived in closed form from gradient and activation statistics using a single-step random feature regression surrogate model, our criterion navigates a design space interpolating from SGD to Muon updates. Moreover, integrating parameter-wise preconditioning allows our framework to recover SGD, Muon, Adam, and MuAdam as specific extrema. To make this adaptive approach scalable, we pair it with efficient computational strategies, achieving only a $\sim$ 3% runtime overhead on highly optimized baselines. As a proof of concept, we show that this data-driven optimizer beats or remains competitive with the performance of the best performing optimizer between Muon and AdamW across three different training scenarios. Ultimately, this work provides evidence that LMO geometry can be successfully and efficiently adapted from runtime data, opening a new pathway for optimizer design beyond static geometries.

</details>


### [455] [Prior Knowledge or Search? A Study of LLM Agents in Hardware-Aware Code Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19782)
*Dmitry Redko,Albert Fazlyev,Konstantin Sozykin,Maria Ivanova,Evgeny Burnaev,Egor Shvetsov*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过三个受控实验发现，LLM在代码优化任务中主要依赖预训练先验知识，而非提供的反馈或智能体结构。具体发现包括：LLM在纯黑箱优化中是贪婪优化器；零样本内核生成中对输入大小信息不敏感；反馈循环优化中CUDA性能单调提升，而TVM IR性能反而下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代LLM智能体结构日益复杂，难以评估各组件贡献程度，也无法确定探索何时以及如何失败。因此需要系统性地回答这些问题。

Method: 通过三个受控实验：(1) 纯黑箱优化实验；(2) 零样本内核生成实验（改变输入大小信息和语言）；(3) 反馈循环内核优化实验（对比CUDA和TVM IR）。

Result: (1) LLM在纯黑箱优化中表现为贪婪优化器；(2) 提供显式输入大小信息无显著效果，模型收敛到相同内核参数；针对非常见内核大小时性能急剧下降；(3) CUDA在迭代反馈下单调提升，TVM IR反而退化。

Conclusion: LLM在代码优化任务中高度依赖预训练先验知识，而非提供的反馈或智能体结构。当语言密度低（如TVM IR）或任务不常见时，性能显著退化。

Abstract: LLM discovery and optimization systems are increasingly applied across domains, implementing a common propose-evaluate-revise loop. Such optimization or discovery progresses via context conditioning on received feedback from an environment. However, as modern LLM agents are increasingly complex in their structure, it is difficult to evaluate which components contribute the most, and when and how this exploration may fail. We answer these questions through three controlled experiments. Our findings: (1) In pure black-box optimization, LLMs act as greedy optimizers. (2) In zero-shot kernel generation, providing explicit input-size information has no measurable effect, models converge to the same kernel parameters regardless of size or temperature, as though the size instruction were invisible. Moreover, when tasked to perform kernel optimization for uncommon kernel sizes, performance sharply degrades regardless of the language used. (3) In feedback-loop kernel optimization, CUDA improves monotonically under iterative feedback, while TVM IR actively degrades, which demonstrates that kernel optimization degrades when models operate with low-density language. Our results conclude that LLMs in code optimization tasks highly depend on pretrained priors rather than provided feedback or agentic structure.

</details>


### [456] [From Prompts to Pavement Through Time: Temporal Grounding in Agentic Scene-to-Plan Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19824)
*Ahmed Y. Gado,Omar Y. Goba,Alaa Hassanein,Catherine M. Elias,Ahmed Hussein*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了在自动驾驶系统中，通过在智能体通信中加入时间条件来增强大型语言模型的时间推理能力。实验发现时间条件会重塑推理风格，但未显著提升标准NLP指标，不过在定性分析中展现出预测性危险推理和稳定纠错行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶中的LLM/LMM集成方法将时间视为次要属性，导致连续动作推理不一致，危及安全性和可解释性。作者希望探索智能体间通信中的时间条件是否能在不降低语义逻辑一致性的前提下，增强或保持推理的连贯性。

Method: 提出了三种逐步增加时间集成度的规划架构，并在BDD-X数据集的子集上进行评估，使用语义、句法和逻辑指标进行定量分析，同时辅以定性分析。

Result: 时间条件在标准NLP正确性指标上未带来统计显著的提升，但定性分析显示其能够产生预测性危险推理、稳定的纠错行为以及Sentinel架构中的策略性分歧。

Conclusion: 研究明确了基于提示的时间条件能力的局限性，并建立了第一个面向时间场景到规划推理的实证基准。

Abstract: Recent attempts to support high-level scene interpretation and planning in Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) using ensembles of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) continue to treat time as a secondary property. This lack of temporal grounding leads to inconsistencies in reasoning about continuous actions, undermining both safety and interpretability. This work explores whether temporal conditioning within inter-agent communication can preserve or enhance coherence without introducing degradation in semantic or logical consistency. To investigate this, we introduce three planner architectures with progressively increasing temporal integration and evaluate them on curated subsets of the BDD-X dataset using semantic, syntactic, and logical metrics. Results show that while temporal conditioning reshapes reasoning style, it yields no statistically significant improvements in standard NLP-based correctness metrics. However, qualitative analysis reveals predictive hazard reasoning, stable corrective behavior, and strategic divergence in the Sentinel. These findings clarify the limits of prompt-based temporal grounding and establish the first empirical benchmark for temporal scene-to-plan reasoning.

</details>


### [457] [Explainable Wastewater Digital Twins: Adaptive Context-Conditioned Structured Simulators with Self-Falsifying Decision Support](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19826)
*Gary Simethy,Daniel Ortiz Arroyo,Petar Durdevic*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种可解释的数字孪生系统CCSS-IX，用于污水处理厂的曝气与投药设定点决策，通过结合可解释的局部线性状态空间专家模型、上下文感知门控网络以及共形风险控制框架，在有限样本下提供统计安全保证，显著减少不安全操作并降低遗憾值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全关键型工业过程（如污水处理厂）依赖数字孪生来筛选控制干预方案，但现有模拟器缺乏认证的安全保证。操作员面临着安全与效率的日常权衡：曝气不足会导致排放超标和N2O激增，曝气过度则浪费能源。亟需一个既能提供可解释动态、又具备统计安全保证的决策支持工具。

Method: 构建CCSS-IX模拟器：采用银行式可解释的局部线性状态空间"专家"模型，由上下文感知门控网络自适应混合，基于连续时间状态切换框架。运行时决策层应用共形风险控制，对操作员提出的动作进行统计认证——选择弃权、重新开放或返回伪造的时间性证据。

Result: 静态结构集成模型相对于无约束黑盒参考的RMSE在0.78%以内，自适应变体在1.08%以内。校准后的重新开放规则在unsafe-action成本权重为4时，将两个工厂的累计遗憾削减43.6%，并在BSM2主片段上完全消除了不安全选择。事件对齐的时间性证据防止了187个假安全N2O批准中的93个，约为dyadic基线的4.65倍（配对McNemar检验p<1e-21）。

Conclusion: 本文提供了双重贡献：AI方面提出了可识别、上下文条件化的结构化替代模型，保留操作员可读的动态特性，以及具有有限样本覆盖保证的自反证决策规则；工程方面提供了一套经过验证的端到端决策支持流水线，在三个测试场景（Avedøre全规模工厂、Agtrup/BlueKolding工厂及BSM2国际基准）中表现出色。

Abstract: Operators of safety-critical industrial processes increasingly rely on digital twins to screen control interventions, but such simulators rarely carry certified safety guarantees. Wastewater treatment plants exemplify the gap: operators face a daily safety-efficiency trade-off where aerating too little risks effluent violations and nitrous-oxide (N2O) spikes, and aerating too much wastes energy. We develop an explainable digital twin for aeration and dosing setpoints. CCSS-IX, the simulator, is a bank of interpretable locally linear state-space "experts" adaptively mixed by a context-aware gating network, building on a continuous-time regime-switching scaffold. A runtime decision layer applies conformal risk control to abstain, reopen, or return a falsifying temporal witness for any operator-proposed action that cannot be statistically certified. The artificial-intelligence contribution is twofold: an identifiable, context-conditioned structured surrogate that retains operator-readable dynamics, and a self-falsifying decision rule with finite-sample coverage guarantees. The engineering contribution is a validated, end-to-end decision-support pipeline, tested on a 1000-step slice of the Avedøre full-scale plant (42.6% sensor missingness, 2-minute sampling), the Agtrup/BlueKolding full-scale plant in Denmark, and the Benchmark Simulation Model No. 2 (BSM2) international benchmark, under a matched ten-seed protocol. The static structured ensemble lies within 0.78% root-mean-square error of an unconstrained black-box reference, and the adaptive variant within 1.08%. The calibrated reopen rule cuts aggregate two-plant regret by 43.6% at an unsafe-action cost weight of 4 and eliminates unsafe chosen actions on the BSM2 main slice. Event-aligned temporal witnesses prevent 93 of 187 false-safe N2O approvals, about 4.65x the dyadic baseline (paired McNemar p < 1e-21).

</details>


### [458] [Streamlined Constraint Reasoning via CNN Pattern Recognition on Enumerated Solutions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19895)
*Patrick Spracklen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合CNN和LLM的新方法，通过枚举可行解、对比学习检测结构模式，再让LLM生成约束编程中的Streamliner约束，在多个基准问题上实现了最高1103倍的加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的自动化Streamliner合成方法要么搜索约束语法，要么直接让LLM基于问题模型生成约束，缺乏对解空间结构模式的直接利用。作者希望通过CNN从可行解中学习结构模式，弥补这一不足。

Method: 枚举可行解，用CNN对比学习区分解与非解，捕捉结构模式；然后将CNN的判别信号输入LLM，合成MiniZinc格式的Streamliner约束。

Result: 在Vessel Loading上实现98.8%的求解时间缩减（加速932倍），Social Golfers 98.6%（356倍），Black Hole 89.4%（1103倍）。

Conclusion: CNN+LLM的混合方法能有效发现超出传统硬化的结构级Streamliner约束，显著提升约束编程问题的求解效率。

Abstract: Constraint programming practitioners accelerate hard problems through a layered set of techniques applied in order of risk. Standard hardening (symmetry-breaking and implied constraints) is applied first and preserves satisfiability. Streamliner constraints, which restrict search to a structural sub-family of solutions, do not preserve satisfiability and are reserved as a final lever. Existing automated streamliner-synthesis approaches either search a constraint grammar or prompt a Large Language Model directly on the problem model. We propose a different approach: enumerate feasible solutions, train a Convolutional Neural Network contrastively against perturbed non-solutions to detect structural patterns, and translate the CNN's discriminative signal into candidate MiniZinc streamliners through LLM-driven synthesis. The CNN grounds the LLM's constraint generation in observed solution structure rather than model text alone. We evaluate on hardened benchmark models where streamliner discovery is the residual performance lever. Our pipeline achieves 98.8% portfolio time reduction on hardened Vessel Loading, 98.6% on hardened Social Golfers, and 89.4% on Black Hole, with best-single streamliners reaching geometric-mean speedups of 932x, 356x, and 1103x respectively. Discovered streamliners include class-based packing constraints on Vessel Loading, beyond-hardening canonicalisations on Social Golfers, and layout-coordinate bounds on Black Hole.

</details>


### [459] [PEEK: Context Map as an Orientation Cache for Long-Context LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19932)
*Zhuohan Gu,Qizheng Zhang,Omar Khattab,Samuel Madden*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PEEK系统，通过维护一个轻量级的"上下文地图"（context map），让LLM代理在与重复出现的外部环境（如文档库和代码仓库）交互时，能够持久保留可复用的导向知识，从而在长上下文推理和信息聚合任务上提升6.3-34.0%的性能，同时大幅降低迭代次数和成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在LLM代理重复处理相同上下文时，只保留代理轨迹、被动访问原始材料或任务级策略，而缺乏对上下文本身的可复用导向知识（如内容组织方式、历史有效的实体/常量/模式等）的持久化，导致效率低下。

Method: PEEK系统包含三个模块：Distiller（从推理信号中提取可迁移知识）、Cartographer（将知识转化为结构化编辑）、Evictor（基于优先级策略在固定token预算下进行淘汰），共同维护一个恒定大小的上下文地图作为代理提示的一部分。

Result: 在长上下文推理和信息聚合任务上，PEEK相比强基线提升6.3-34.0%，迭代次数减少93-145次，成本比ACE低1.7-5.8倍；在上下文学习任务上，解题率提升6.0-14.0%，评分准确率提升7.8-12.1%，成本为ACE的1.4倍；效果在多种LM和代理架构上泛化。

Conclusion: 上下文地图能够帮助长上下文LLM代理更准确、更高效地与重复出现的外部上下文进行交互，验证了持久化导向知识的重要性。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly operate over long and recurring external contexts, like document corpora and code repositories. Across invocations, existing approaches preserve either the agent's trajectory, passive access to raw material, or task-level strategies. None of them preserves what we argue is most needed for repeated same-context workloads: reusable orientation knowledge (e.g., what the context contains, how it is organized, and which entities, constants, and schemas have historically been useful) about the recurring context itself. We introduce PEEK, a system that caches and maintains this orientation knowledge as a context map: a small, constant-sized artifact in the agent's prompt that gives it a persistent peek into the external context. The map is maintained by a programmable cache policy with three modules: a Distiller that extracts transferable knowledge from inference-time signals, a Cartographer that translates it into structured edits, and a priority-based Evictor that enforces a fixed token budget. On long-context reasoning and information aggregation, PEEK improves over strong baselines by 6.3-34.0% while using 93-145 fewer iterations and incurring 1.7-5.8x lower cost than the state-of-the-art prompt-learning framework, ACE. On context learning, PEEK improves solving rate and rubric accuracy by 6.0-14.0% and 7.8-12.1%, respectively, at 1.4x lower cost than ACE. These gains generalize across LMs and agent architectures, including OpenAI Codex, a production-grade coding agent. Together, these results show that a context map helps long-context LLM agents interact with recurring external contexts more accurately and efficiently.

</details>


### [460] [Robotics-Inspired Guardrails for Foundation Models in Socially Sensitive Domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19940)
*Rebecca Ramnauth,Drazen Brscic,Brian Scassellati*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出将大模型防护栏重新定义为运行时行为控制问题，借鉴机器人学中的约束执行概念，构建了Grounded Observer框架，并在三个实际部署场景（闲聊、自闭症家庭治疗、学校行为降级）中验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有防护栏方法（如对齐训练、提示工程、解码约束、事后审核）主要提供经验性的风险降低而非可强制执行的行为保证，且将安全性视为单个输出的属性而非交互轨迹的属性。在社交敏感领域（教育、心理健康、照护）中，失败往往是累积性和依赖上下文的，亟需更强的行为保障。

Method: 借鉴机器人学中不确定闭环系统的约束执行形式化概念，将防护栏重构为交互轨迹的运行时可控制问题；提出Grounded Observer框架，在三个现实部署场景中实现运行时干预，防止交互漂移到不良状态，同时适应多样的社会情境。

Result: 在闲聊、自闭症家庭治疗、学校行为降级三个场景中，该框架能够通过运行时干预有效减缓交互轨迹向不良状态的漂移，并能适应不同社会上下文。

Conclusion: 防护栏问题应被重新定义为交互轨迹的运行时可控制问题；Grounded Observer框架在实际部署中展现了有效性；未来研究方向包括更强形式化保证的扩展。

Abstract: Foundation models are increasingly deployed in socially sensitive domains such as education, mental health, and caregiving, where failures are often cumulative and context-dependent. Existing guardrail approaches -- ranging from training-time alignment to prompting, decoding constraints, and post-hoc moderation -- primarily provide empirical risk reduction rather than enforceable behavioral guarantees, and largely treat safety as a property of individual outputs rather than interaction trajectories. We reframe guardrails as a problem of runtime behavioral control over interaction trajectories, drawing on robotics to introduce formal constructs for constraint enforcement in uncertain, closed-loop systems. We instantiate these ideas in the Grounded Observer framework and apply it across three real-world deployments: small talk, in-home autism therapy, and behavioral de-escalation in schools. Across settings, the framework enables runtime interventions that mitigate drift into undesirable interaction regimes while adapting to diverse social contexts. We discuss extensions to the framework and propose research directions toward stronger guarantees.

</details>


### [461] [Probabilistic Tiny Recursive Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19943)
*Amin Sghaier,Ali Parviz,Alexia Jolicoeur-Martineau*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PTRM通过在递归步骤注入高斯噪声实现随机探索，无需重训练即可在测试时扩展计算，用7M参数在推理任务上超越前沿LLM（准确率91.2% vs 55.1%），成本仅为0.0001倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Tiny Recursive Models (TRM)的确定性递归容易收敛到次优解且缺乏逃逸机制，现有方法依赖任务特定的测试时扰动和投票聚合，缺乏通用性。

Method: 在TRM的每个深度递归步骤注入高斯噪声，生成多条并行轨迹探索不同解空间，利用模型原有的Q头（原用于早停）从候选解中选择最优答案。

Result: Sudoku-Extreme准确率从87.4%提升至98.75%；Pencil Puzzle Bench准确率从62.6%提升至91.2%，超越前沿LLM（55.1%），仅用7M参数，成本为0.0001倍。

Conclusion: PTRM是一种任务无关的测试时计算扩展框架，通过随机探索显著提升小模型推理能力，无需重训练或任务特定增强。

Abstract: Tiny Recursive Models (TRM) solve complex reasoning tasks with a fraction of the parameters of modern large language models (LLMs) by iteratively refining a latent state and final answer. While powerful, their deterministic recursion can lead to convergence at suboptimal solutions, without escape mechanism. A common workaround relies on task-specific input perturbations at test time combined with answer aggregation via voting. We introduce Probabilistic TRM (PTRM), a task-agnostic framework for test-time compute scaling that addresses this limitation through stochastic exploration. PTRM injects Gaussian noise at each deep recursion step, enabling parallel trajectories to explore diverse solution basins, and selects among them using the model's existing Q head (used for early stopping in the original TRM). Without requiring retraining or task-specific augmentations, PTRM enables substantial accuracy gains across benchmarks, including Sudoku-Extreme (87.4% to 98.75%) and on various puzzles from Pencil Puzzle Bench (62.6% to 91.2%). On the latter, PTRM achieves nearly double the accuracy of frontier LLMs (91.2% vs. 55.1%) at less than 0.0001x the cost, using only 7M parameters.

</details>


### [462] [GeoX: Mastering Geospatial Reasoning Through Self-Play and Verifiable Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20006)
*Kyeongjin Ahn,Seungeon Lee,Krishna P. Gummadi,Meeyoung Cha*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GeoX是一个自博弈框架，通过可执行程序获取空间逻辑并产生可验证奖励，无需大规模人工标注数据，在卫星/航拍图像上进行空间推理，显著提升基础视觉语言模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 地理空间推理需要解决基于图像的复杂空间结构问题，但注释海量且组合性的问题空间成本高昂，亟需一种不依赖大规模人工标注数据的自主学习方法。

Method: 提出GeoX自博弈框架，使用单一多模态策略模型将空间问题表达为可执行程序，在三种推理模式（溯因、演绎、归纳）下求解，并通过验证器执行程序产生奖励信号，利用强化学习联合优化问题提出和求解两个角色。

Result: GeoX在基础视觉语言模型上平均提升最多5.5个点，匹配或超越了基于数百万人工标注数据训练的常规基线方法，并发布了自博弈过程中积累的地理空间理解基准。

Conclusion: 通过自博弈和可执行程序驱动的可验证奖励，GeoX有效实现了无需大规模人工数据的地理空间推理能力提升，展示了自监督学习在该领域的巨大潜力。

Abstract: Geospatial reasoning requires solving image-grounded problems over the complex spatial structure of a scene. However, developing this capability is hindered by the cost of annotating a vast and combinatorial question space. We propose GeoX, a self-play framework that acquires spatial logic through executable programs that yield verifiable rewards, without relying on large-scale human-curated data Given a satellite or aerial image, our framework employs a single multimodal policy that proposes spatial problems as executable programs and solves them under three reasoning modes-abduction, deduction, and induction-over spatial primitives and an image understanding tool. A verifier executes each program to covert a reward signal that jointly optimizes the two roles via reinforcement learning. GeoX consistently improves its base VLMs by up to 5.5 points on average, matching or exceeding conventional baselines trained on millions of curated data. Along-side the proposed method, we release a benchmark for geospatial understanding accumulated through self-play.

</details>


### [463] [AutoResearchClaw: Self-Reinforcing Autonomous Research with Human-AI Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20025)
*Jiaqi Liu,Shi Qiu,Mairui Li,Bingzhou Li,Haonian Ji,Siwei Han,Xinyu Ye,Peng Xia,Zihan Dong,Congyu Zhang,Letian Zhang,Guiming Chen,Haoqin Tu,Xinyu Yang,Lu Feng,Xujiang Zhao,Haifeng Chen,Jiawei Zhou,Xiao Wang,Weitong Zhang,Hongtu Zhu,Yun Li,Jieru Mei,Hongliang Fei,Jiaheng Zhang,Linjie Li,Linjun Zhang,Yuyin Zhou,Sheng Wang,Caiming Xiong,James Zou,Zeyu Zheng,Cihang Xie,Mingyu Ding,Huaxiu Yao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AutoResearchClaw 是一个多智能体自主科研管线，通过结构化辩论、自愈执行、可验证报告、人机协与跨轮进化五大机制，将科研从线性流水线转变为迭代闭环，在 ARC-Bench 上比 AI Scientist v2 提升 54.7%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自主科研系统将研究过程建模为线性流水线：依赖单智能体推理、执行失败即停止、无法跨轮积累经验。作者希望打破这一局限，构建一个真正迭代、能从失败中学习、支持人机深度协作的科研自动化框架。

Method: 提出五个核心机制：(1) 结构化多智能体辩论用于假设生成与结果分析；(2) 自愈执行器，含 Pivot/Refine 决策循环将失败转化为信息；(3) 可验证结果报告，杜绝编造数字与虚假引用；(4) 七种干预模式的人机协作，从全自动到逐步监督；(5) 跨轮进化，将过往错误转化为未来防护。

Result: 在 25 个主题的 ARC-Bench 实验级基准上，AutoResearchClaw 比 AI Scientist v2 提升 54.7%。七种干预模式的人机消融实验表明：在高杠杆决策点进行精准、定向协作，效果优于全自动和逐步监督两种极端模式。

Conclusion: AutoResearchClaw 定位为"研究放大器"，强调增强而非取代人类科学判断。代码已开源。

Abstract: Automating scientific discovery requires more than generating papers from ideas. Real research is iterative: hypotheses are challenged from multiple perspectives, experiments fail and inform the next attempt, and lessons accumulate across cycles. Existing autonomous research systems often model this process as a linear pipeline: they rely on single-agent reasoning, stop when execution fails, and do not carry experience across runs. We present AutoResearchClaw, a multi-agent autonomous research pipeline built on five mechanisms: structured multi-agent debate for hypothesis generation and result analysis, a self-healing executor with a \textsc{Pivot}/\textsc{Refine} decision loop that transforms failures into information, verifiable result reporting that prevents fabricated numbers and hallucinated citations, human-in-the-loop collaboration with seven intervention modes spanning full autonomy to step-by-step oversight, and cross-run evolution that converts past mistakes into future safeguards. On ARC-Bench, a 25-topic experiment-stage benchmark, AutoResearchClaw outperforms AI Scientist v2 by 54.7%. A human-in-the-loop ablation across seven intervention modes reveals that precise, targeted collaboration at high-leverage decision points consistently outperforms both full autonomy and exhaustive step-by-step oversight. We position AutoResearchClaw as a research amplifier that augments rather than replaces human scientific judgment. Code is available at https://github.com/aiming-lab/AutoResearchClaw.

</details>


### [464] [Probing Embodied LLMs: When Higher Observation Fidelity Hurts Problem Solving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20072)
*Oussama Zenkri,Oliver Brock*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文发现大语言模型在机器人任务中，使用原始RGB输入比使用完美符号观测表现更好，适度噪声（40%翻转概率）能提升2.85倍成功率，原因是噪声减少了重复动作循环。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在机器人系统中决策过程不透明，难以解释成功或失败原因，需要一种行为学方法系统性地研究其行为。

Method: 使用Lockbox机械谜题作为测试平台，在物理机器人上比较RGB、RGB-D和符号观测三种输入；在仿真中通过随机翻转感知动作结果来引入噪声。

Result: RGB输入表现最佳，完美符号观测表现最差；仿真中40%噪声翻转概率下成功率提升2.85倍，且噪声减少了重复动作循环。

Conclusion: 仅凭成功率不足以评估LLM，观测到的性能可能反映感知错误与推理缺陷的交互，而非鲁棒的问题解决能力。

Abstract: Large Language Models are increasingly proposed as cognitive components for robotic systems, yet their opaque decision processes make it difficult to explain success or failure in closed-loop embodied tasks. Following an empirical AI methodology, we study embodied LLM agents behaviorally by varying the information available to the agent and measuring the resulting changes in behavior. Using the Lockbox, a sequential mechanical puzzle with hidden interdependencies, we evaluate LLMs across RGB, RGB-D, and ground-truth symbolic observations in a physical robotic setup and use controlled simulation to probe the resulting behavior. Counterintuitively, agents perform best under raw RGB input and worst under perfect ground-truth observations. In simulation, we probe this effect by randomly flipping perceived action outcomes and find that moderate noise improves performance, peaking at a 40% flip probability with a 2.85-fold success rate increase over the noise-free baseline. Further analysis links this gain to a reduction in repetitive action loops. These findings suggest that success rates alone are insufficient for evaluating LLMs, as measured performance may reflect the interaction between perceptual errors and reasoning failures rather than robust problem solving.

</details>


### [465] [Neurosymbolic Learning for Inference-Time Argumentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20098)
*Gabriel Freedman,Adam Dejl,Adam Gould,Mansi,Lihu Chen,Jianqi Jiang,Francesca Toni*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种推理时论证（ITA）框架，通过形式论证语义与LLM训练相结合，实现三元（真/假/不确定）声明验证，并保证预测结果对生成论证的忠实性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在健康和金融等高风险场景中，声明验证需要处理信息不完整或冲突的情况，此时不确定答案比二元分类更合适，且需要忠实可解释的决策过程。

Method: ITA是一种可训练的神经符号框架：1）形式论证语义用于指导LLM训练生成论证并赋予基础分数；2）利用这些带分数的论证计算三元预测结果。训练时优化论证生成与打分，推理时预测结果忠实于论证结构。

Result: 在两个三元声明验证数据集上，ITA优于基于论证的基线方法，并能与非论证的直接预测基线竞争，同时提供确定性的、可检查的论证结构。

Conclusion: 通过将形式论证语义嵌入训练和推理过程，ITA实现了兼具性能与可解释性的三元声明验证，避免了传统推理模型中事后解释不忠实的问题。

Abstract: Claim verification is an important problem in high-stakes settings, including health and finance. When information underpinning claims is incomplete or conflicting, uncertain answers may be more appropriate than binary true or false classifications. In all cases, faithful explanations of the considerations determining the final verdict are crucial. We introduce inference-time argumentation (ITA), a trainable neurosymbolic framework for ternary claim verification in which a formal argumentation semantics giving the strength of claims is used both (i) to guide LLM training as models learn to generate arguments and assign them base scores (representing intrinsic strengths) and (ii) to compute ternary (true/false/uncertain) predictions from generated, scored arguments. As a result, at training time, argument generation and scoring can be optimised according to the quality of the induced argumentative predictions. Moreover, at inference time, the final prediction is faithful, by construction, to the arguments and scores determining the verdict, rather than being justified by a potentially unfaithful post-hoc reasoning trace as in conventional reasoning models. We finally show that, on two datasets for ternary claim verification, ITA improves upon argumentative baselines and can perform competitively against non-argumentative direct-prediction baselines, while providing verdicts that are computed deterministically from explicit, inspectable argumentative structures.

</details>


### [466] [Using Aristotle API for AI-Assisted Theorem Proving in Lean 4: A Formalisation Case Study of the Grasshopper Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20120)
*Gabriel Rongyang Lau*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过Lean 4形式化IMO 2009第6题（蚱蜢问题）的AI辅助证明案例，展示了AI在奥林匹克数学定理证明中的进展与局限：四个辅助引理被成功验证，但主定理因缺少全局计数步骤而留下未解决的空洞（sorry）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究AI辅助定理证明在奥林匹克数学问题上的实际可靠性和局限性，特别是形式化验证过程中哪些部分能被成功验证、哪些不能被验证，以及背后的根本原因。

Method: 以Aristotle API生成的Lean 4证明工件为案例，分析其形式化内容：四个已验证的辅助引理（分别处理部分和相等、相邻交换的效果、部分和的形式、以及最大性与禁集成员的关系）和一个未证明的主定理空洞，并对比AI输出摘要与Lean源码之间的差距。

Result: 验证了四个局部辅助引理，但主定理（蚱蜢问题）未完成；AI能处理局部推理但无法完成所需的全局计数论证，且AI的摘要描述与实际的Lean形式化之间存在不一致（摘要声称的计数步骤未在源码中实现）。

Conclusion: 该案例揭示了AI辅助形式化的核心瓶颈：局部证明搜索可以成功，但全局组合计数簿记（如鸽笼原理等跨步推理）仍是待解决的关键挑战。

Abstract: AI-assisted theorem proving can now generate substantial Lean developments for olympiad-level mathematics, but the evidential status of such developments depends on which declarations are actually verified. This paper reports a Lean 4 formalization case study of an Aristotle API proof attempt for the Grasshopper problem, originally posed as IMO 2009 Problem 6. The generated artifact states a generalized Lean version of the theorem, contains four verified helper lemmas for local components of a maximality and adjacent-swap exchange strategy, and leaves the main theorem grasshopper closed directly by one unresolved sorry. The verified components establish that the final partial sum equals the total sum, that an adjacent transposition can affect only the relevant intermediate partial sum, that the changed partial sum has the expected form, and that maximality at a position admitting an adjacent successor swap forces a corresponding forbidden-set membership fact. The Aristotle output summary identifies the intended remaining mathematical step as the global counting step needed to show that these membership facts produce at least n distinct forbidden values, contradicting the cardinality assumption |M| < n; the Lean source itself does not reduce the main theorem to a separately encoded counting lemma. This case study gives an inspectable example of a central limitation in AI-assisted formalization, namely that local proof search can succeed while the global combinatorial bookkeeping required for a theorem remains unresolved. The paper contributes a reproducible Lean artifact and a precise analysis of its verified and unverified proof content.

</details>


### [467] [Not Every Rubric Teaches Equally: Policy-Aware Rubric Rewards for RLVR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20164)
*Utkarsh Tyagi,Xingang Guo,MohammadHossein Rezaei,Daniel George,Anas Mahmoud,Jackson Lee,Bing Liu,Yunzhong He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出POW3R，一种策略感知的评分标准奖励框架，通过自适应调整标准级奖励权重，解决了标准RL中固定聚合方式混淆人类重要性与优化信号有用性的问题。实验表明POW3R在30个基线-指标对比中赢得24个，并将训练速度提升2.5-4倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准RL中使用固定聚合方式的评分标准奖励会将一个标准的人类重要性与它当前作为优化信号的有用性混淆。许多重要标准已经饱和或不可达，而能区分rollout的标准不一定是人类权重最大的那些。

Method: POW3R采用策略感知的评分标准奖励框架，在保持人类权重和类别平衡作为评分标准目标的同时，自适应调整标准级奖励权重。它利用rollout级对比来强调当前能区分策略输出的标准，使GRPO奖励更具信息性而不改变底层评估目标。

Result: 在3种基础策略、2个数据集（多模态和纯文本）上的实验中，POW3R在30个基线-指标对比中赢得24个，同时提高了平均评分标准奖励和严格完成率，训练步骤减少2.5-4倍。

Conclusion: 评分标准奖励应该区分最终答案中应该重视什么和当前策略能学到什么，即人类权重和优化信号权重需要解耦。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has made post-training highly effective when correctness can be checked automatically. However, many important model behaviors require satisfying several qualitative criteria at once. Rubric-based rewards address this setting by grading prompt-specific criteria and aggregating them into a scalar reward. Yet standard static aggregations conflate a criterion's human-assigned importance with its current usefulness as an optimization signal. We show that this assumption breaks down in rubric RL: many important criteria are already saturated or currently unreachable, while criteria that distinguish rollouts are not necessarily those with the largest human weights. We introduce POW3R, a policy-aware rubric reward framework that preserves human weights and category balance as the rubric objective while adapting criterion-level reward weights during training. POW3R uses rollout-level contrast to emphasize criteria that currently separate the policy's outputs, making the GRPO reward more informative without changing the underlying evaluation target. Across three base policies on two datasets spanning multimodal and text-only settings, POW3R wins $24$ of $30$ base-policy/metric comparisons, improving both mean rubric reward and strict completion (the fraction of prompts whose response satisfies every required rubric criterion) over vanilla GRPO with rubric rewards, and reaches the same plateau in $2.5$--$4\times$ fewer training steps. Rubric rewards should therefore distinguish what should matter in the final answer from what can teach the current policy.

</details>


### [468] [HaorFloodAlert: Deseasonalized ML Ensemble for 72-Hour Flood Prediction in Bangladesh Haor Wetlands](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20167)
*Salma Hoque Talukdar Koli,Fahima Haque Talukder Jely,Md. Samiul Alim,Md. Zakir Hossen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了HaorFloodAlert，一种去季节化机器学习集成模型，用于孟加拉国haor湿地的72小时洪水概率预报。模型解决了传统河流洪水模型无法捕捉回水动力学的问题，利用上游SAR代理数据提供约36小时提前预警。集成模型（RF+XGBoost）在77个真实Sentinel-1事件上达到89.6%的LOOCV准确率、87.5%召回率和0.943 AUC-ROC，并包含三级预警管道和boro水稻损失估算器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 孟加拉国haor湿地常发生突发性洪水，几乎无预警，严重破坏boro水稻收成。现有洪水预警系统主要针对河流洪水设计，无法捕捉该地区平缓地形下的回水动力学特征，导致预警失效。亟需针对haor湿地特性的洪水预报系统。

Method: 构建去季节化机器学习集成模型（RF权重0.5625 + XGBoost权重0.4375），去除温度作为"季节作弊码"的影响；利用上游印度Silchar的Barak河Sentinel-1 SAR影像作为代理数据，提供约36小时提前期；采用Otsu阈值SAR变化检测验证空间一致性（84-91%）；设计三级预警管道；集成BRRI校准的boro水稻损失估算器。

Result: 在77个真实Sentinel-1事件上，集成模型达到89.6%的LOOCV准确率、87.5%召回率和0.943 AUC-ROC。Otsu阈值SAR变化检测空间匹配度为84-91%。温度作为特征会虚假提升6.9个百分点准确率，已被识别并去除。

Conclusion: HaorFloodAlert成功针对haor湿地特殊地理环境设计了专用洪水预警系统，解决了传统模型忽视回水动力学的问题。通过去季节化处理消除了温度带来的虚假高精度，利用上游SAR数据延长了预警时间，为boro水稻种植提供了实用的灾害管理工具。

Abstract: Flash floods in Bangladesh's haor wetlands show up with almost no warning. They wreck the annual boro rice harvest. Current setups, built for riverine floods, miss backwater dynamics entirely. These basins are flat. Water does not behave like it does on the Brahmaputra.
  We built HaorFloodAlert, a deseasonalized machine learning ensemble that forecasts 72-hour flood probability for the Sunamganj Haor (approximately 8,000 km2). Temperature was acting as a seasonal cheat code - it inflated accuracy by 6.9 pp just because floods happen in warm months. We caught that. We also built an upstream Barak River Sentinel-1 SAR proxy from Silchar, Assam, giving about 36 hours of lead time. Otsu-thresholded SAR change detection validates at 84-91 percent spatial match.
  The operational ensemble (RF 0.5625 + XGBoost 0.4375) hits 89.6 percent LOOCV accuracy, 87.5 percent recall, and 0.943 AUC-ROC on 77 real Sentinel-1 events. A three-tier alert pipeline and a BRRI-calibrated boro rice damage estimator are included.

</details>


### [469] [A Methodology for Selecting and Composing Runtime Architecture Patterns for Production LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20173)
*Vasundra Srinivasan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出随机-确定性边界（SDB）作为生产级LLM Agent架构的核心原语，围绕它设计了三种关注点（协调、状态、控制）和六种运行时模式，并提供模式选择方法、故障诊断程序和重放发散等关键概念。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生产级LLM Agent中，随机模型输出与确定性软件系统之间的边界从未被作为一等架构对象对待，缺乏系统化的设计原则和故障诊断方法。

Method: 定义SDB四部分契约（提议者、验证者、提交步骤、拒绝信号），将Agent运行时设计组织为协调、状态、控制三个关注点，提出六种运行时模式（层次委派、分散-收集+Saga、事件驱动序列、共享状态机、监督者+门控、人在回路），并给出五步模式选择方法论和可靠性分解方法。

Result: 提出了重放发散这一重要失效模式，推导出随模型方差减小，模式选择和SDB强度对长期可靠性的杠杆作用越来越大，并在五个工作负载上应用了该方法论，提供了90天合同续签Agent的可运行参考实现。

Conclusion: SDB是生产Agent运行时的核心原语，合理设计SDB和选择运行时模式是提升系统长期可靠性的关键，尤其在模型方差不断降低的趋势下。

Abstract: Production LLM agents combine stochastic model outputs with deterministic software systems, yet the boundary between the two is rarely treated as a first-class architectural object. This paper names that boundary the stochastic-deterministic boundary (SDB): a four-part contract among a proposer, verifier, commit step, and reject signal that specifies how an LLM output becomes a system action. We argue that the SDB is the load-bearing primitive of production agent runtimes.
  Around this primitive, we organize agent runtime design into three concerns: Coordination, State, and Control. We present a catalog of six runtime patterns that compose the SDB differently across conversational, autonomous, and long-horizon agents: hierarchical delegation, scatter-gather plus saga, event-driven sequencing, shared state machine, supervisor plus gate, and human in the loop. For each pattern, we trace its lineage to distributed-systems concepts and identify what changes when the worker is stochastic.
  The paper contributes a five-step methodology for selecting runtime patterns, a diagnostic procedure that maps production failures to pattern weaknesses, and a failure mode called replay divergence, in which LLM-based consumers of a deterministic event log produce different downstream outputs under model-version or prompt changes. A stylized reliability decomposition separates per-call model variance from architectural momentum, motivating the claim that as model variance decreases, pattern choice and SDB strength become increasingly important levers for long-run reliability. We apply the methodology to five workloads and provide one runnable reference implementation for a 90-day contract-renewal agent.

</details>
